zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Seton於1350年出生在蘇格蘭。她和Anan de Wyntoun至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Seton于1350年出生在苏格兰。她和Anan de Wyntoun至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Seton was born in 1350, in Scotland. She had at least 1 daughter with Anan de Wyntoun.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Seton est née en 1350, à Écosse. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Anan de Wyntoun.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Seton wurde 1350 in Scotland geboren. Sie hatte mit Anan de Wyntoun mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Seton è nata il nel 1350 nel Scotland. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Anan de Wyntoun.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Setonは1350年にスコットランドで生まれた。彼女はAnan de Wyntounとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Seton(은)는 1350년 스컷랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Anan de Wyntoun(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Seton nasceu em 1350, em Scotland. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Anan de Wyntoun.
